description: Manifest for synthetic test cases with simplified ground truth for demonstration purposes

synthetic_test_cases.description: Simulated accent variation test case for demonstration

expected_segments.speaker: Speaker_A
expected_segments.text: Good morning everyone. Today we'll be discussing the quarterly results and future projections.

expected_segments.speaker: Speaker_B
expected_segments.text: Thank you for the introduction. I'd like to start with the revenue figures from this quarter.

expected_segments.speaker: Speaker_C
expected_segments.text: The numbers are quite encouraging actually. We have seen significant growth in all sectors.

expected_segments.speaker: Speaker_A
expected_segments.text: Can everyone hear me okay? There seems to be some background noise from the construction outside.

expected_segments.speaker: Speaker_B
expected_segments.text: Yes, we can hear you. Maybe we should close the windows to reduce the traffic noise.

expected_segments.speaker: Speaker_C
expected_segments.text: The air conditioning is also quite loud today. Should we adjust the settings?

usage_note: These synthetic test cases are for demonstration and framework testing. In production, actual audio files with corresponding ground truth would be used.
